name: Barley, Corn, Roasted Poblano and Cherry Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 pint red cherry tomatoes, halved or quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 6 cups water to a boil. Add the barley and salt.
2. Reduce heat and cover; simmer until tender, about 40 minutes.
3. Drain the barley well and rinse with cold water until cooled.
4. In a blender, combine white wine vinegar, garlic, jalapeno, cilantro, and oil.
5. Blend until smooth and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. In a large bowl, mix cooked barley with dressing.
7. Add scallions, corn, and tomatoes; season again as desired.
8. Cover and chill before serving.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
